title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at DHL India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at DHL India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DHL India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About DHL India:
DHL India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DHL India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
